title: We Come, O Christ, to You

verses.text: You are the Way to God, your blood our ransom paid; in you we face our Judge and Maker unafraid. Before the throne absolved we stand, your love has met your law’s demand.
You are the living Truth! All wisdom dwells in you, the Source of ev’ry skill, the one eternal True! O great I AM! In you we rest, sure answer to our ev’ry quest.
You only are true Life, to know you is to live the more abundant life that earth can never give: O risen Lord! We live in you: in us each day your life renew!
We worship you, Lord Christ, our Saviour and our King, to you our youth and strength adoringly we bring: so fill our hearts, that all may view your life in us, and turn to you.
